settings.title: Clean & Dry the Area
settings.description: Gently wash the affected area with mild soap and warm water. Pat completely dry before application.

settings.title: Apply Precisely
settings.description: Apply a small amount directly using the precision applicator. Avoid surrounding healthy skin. Allow to absorb fully.

settings.title: Repeat Daily
settings.description: Apply once or twice daily as directed. Consistency is key — most customers see visible improvement within 3–6 weeks of regular use.

settings.name: Thuja

settings.heading: Ayurvedic Botanicals for Skin

settings.question: How do I apply the Wart Remover?
settings.answer: Clean and dry the area thoroughly. Using the precision applicator, apply a small, precise amount directly on the wart. Avoid surrounding healthy skin. Let it absorb fully. Apply once or twice daily. Do not cover with a bandage unless advised.

settings.question: How long before I see visible results?
settings.answer: Ayurvedic topical formulas work gradually with the skin's natural renewal cycle. Most customers notice visible changes within 3–6 weeks of consistent daily application. Results may vary based on the size, depth, and individual skin type.

settings.question: Is it safe to use on sensitive or facial skin?
settings.answer: The formula is lab tested for dermal safety. However, we recommend performing a patch test on a small area first and waiting 24 hours. For facial application or sensitive skin areas, consult a dermatologist. Avoid contact with eyes, mucous membranes, and open wounds.

settings.question: What should I do if I experience irritation?
settings.answer: If you experience unusual irritation, redness, or discomfort, discontinue use immediately and rinse the area with cool water. Consult a dermatologist if irritation persists. Individual skin sensitivity varies.

settings.question: Can children use this product?
settings.answer: We recommend this product only for adults (18+). For children, please consult a pediatric dermatologist before use. Keep out of reach of children.

settings.title: Ayurvedic solution that actually works
settings.review: Mujhe chemical treatments se dar lagta tha. This natural formula gave me confidence to try. Seeing visible difference in 4 weeks. Will definitely recommend to everyone.

settings.title: Gentle and effective — no harsh chemicals
settings.review: I tried multiple chemical-based options before this. This Ayurvedic formula is so much gentler. No burning, no scarring. I can see it working slowly but surely. Happy with the purchase.

settings.title: Takes time but works naturally
settings.review: Was skeptical at first but after 5 weeks of consistent use I can see real improvement. Takes patience but worth it since it's completely natural. No side effects at all.
